message:
fix: Complete operator coverage and truthiness checks in codegen

- aug_assign.zig: Add Mod, LShift, RShift to SimpleOpStrings map,
  handle Pow (**=) specially with std.math.pow, handle MatMul (@=)
  with __imatmul__ method, replace invalid " ? " fallback with unreachable
- comparison.zig: Fix complex number ordering comparison to use
  unreachable instead of invalid @compileError expression
- expressions.zig: Add truthiness checks for dict, set, tuple, bytes
  types in conditional expressions (ternary operator)
